snippet.title: MARINA - Purge The Poison (Official Video)
snippet.description:
"ANCIENT DREAMS IN A MODERN LAND". AVAILABLE JUNE 11TH.
PRE-ORDER/ PRE-SAVE: https://marina.lnk.to/ADIAMLID

"PURGE THE POISON" Available Now. https://marina.lnk.to/PurgeThePoisonID

Text 323.433.6663 to join the sisterhood. https://www.allmyfriendsarewitches.com/

Directed by: Weird Life Films @weirdlifefilms
Concept by: MARINA & Weird Life Films
Executive Producers: Laura Gordon, Ryan Ohm, & Jackson James
Video Commissioner: Trevor Joseph Newton
Produced by: Erin Boyle & Anthony Pedone
Director of Photography: Jackson James
Gaffer: Paul Deorio
Key Grip: Michael Suraci
Art Direction: Justin Ryan Brown
Make Up Artist: Anthony Nguyen
Hair Stylist: Rena Calhoun
Wardrobe Stylist: Mercedes Natalia
Custom Wardrobe Designed by: Oscar Lima
Edit & Color: Ryan Ohm
VFX: Ryan Ohm & Rick Gorge
PA: Matt Garland
COVID Compliance Officer: Anthony Pedone

Subscribe to the MARINA YouTube Channel - https://Marina.lnk.to/subscribeID​ 

Follow MARINA 
https://www.marinaofficial.co.uk/
https://www.instagram.com/marinadiama​...
https://twitter.com/marinadiamandis​
https://www.facebook.com/marinadiamandis​
https://marina.lnk.to/spotify​ 
https://marina.lnk.to/applemusic​
https://soundcloud.com/marinadiamandis

#MARINA #PurgeThePoison #OfficialMusicVideo #AncientDreamsInAModernLand

LYRICS
All my friends are witches
And we live in Hollywood
Mystical bitches
Making our own sisterhood
Whilst society is falling
We are quietly reforming
Protecting the planet
Healing our own damage

Quarantined, all alone
Mother nature on the phone
What have you been doing?
Don’t forget, I am your home
Virus come, fires burn
Until human beings learn
From every disaster
You are not my master

Need to purge the poison
Show us our humanity
All the bad and good
Racism and misogyny
Nothing’s hidden anymore
Capitalism made us poor
God forgive America
For every single war

Need to purge the poison
From my system until
Human beings listen
Tell me, who’d you think are?
It’s your own decision
But your home is now your prison
You forgot that without me
You won’t go far

2007, when size zero was the rage
Britney shaved her head and all we did was call her crazed
Harvey Weinstein’s gone to jail, #metoo helped us to unveil
Truth and all its glory
The ending of a story

It’s a New World Order
Everything just falls away
Our life as we knew it
Now belongs to yesterday
Inside all the love and the hate
We can all regenerate
Stop how we been living
Every single day

Need to purge the poison
From my system until
Human beings listen
Tell me, who’d you think are?
It’s your own decision
But your home is now your prison
You forgot that without me
You won’t go far

I just want a world where I can see the feminine
We only make up one quarter of the government
Like an angel gone to hell
Cast the moon under our spell
Owning our power
Taking back what’s ours

Earth is like a white rose
Quiet cloud of petals cold
A place so corrupt where Angel’s flesh and blood is sold
The feminine is born as new
Studded with a diamond dew
Saw the dawn was coming
Everybody knew

Need to purge the poison
From my system until Human beings listen
Tell me, who’d you think are?
It’s your own decision
But your home is now your prison
You forgot that without me
You won’t go far

Need to purge the poison
From my system until Human beings listen
Tell me, who’d you think are?
It’s your own decision
But your home is now your prison
You forgot that without me
You won’t go far

Stop how we been living
Every single day

Need to purge the poison
From my system until
Human beings listen
Tell me, who’d you think are?
It’s your own decision
But your home is now your prison
You forgot that without me
You won’t go far

I just want a world where I can see the feminine
We only make up one quarter of the government
Like an angel gone to hell
Cast the moon under our spell
Owning our power
Taking back what’s ours

Earth is like a white rose
Quiet cloud of petals cold
A place so corrupt where Angel’s flesh and blood is sold
The feminine is born as new
Studded with a diamond dew
Saw the dawn was coming
Everybody knew

Need to purge the poison
From my system until Human beings listen
Tell me, who’d you think are?
It’s your own decision
But your home is now your prison
You forgot that without me
You won’t go far

From my system until Human beings listen
Tell me, who’d you think are?
It’s your own decision
But your home is now your prison
You forgot that without me
You won’t go far

snippet.title: La Mia Trasformazione Fisica in 30 Giorni di Dieta | Non ci credevo!
snippet.description:
Accedi immediatamente ai materiali gratuiti dell'Academy ➡️ https://www.umbertomiletto.it/digiunointermittente-academy-l

Oggi si fa sul serio! Ti voglio mostrare la mia trasformazione ma non solo! Oltre a me ci saranno anche le trasformazioni di altri 3 nostri allievi che hanno messo in pratica le potenti strategie del Digiuno Intermittente. 

E devo confessarti che siamo entusiasti di vedere come le potenti strategie del Digiuno Intermittente possano realmente cambiare il modo di mangiare delle persone in meglio.

Vedrai come grazie alle strategia dell’Acamey hanno cambiato il loro corpo e trasformato la loro vita grazie a questo approccio nutrizionale.

Questo approccio si rivela estremamente efficace per tutte quelle persone che hanno poco tempo per conteggiare le calorie, pesare gli alimenti e fare 5-6 pasti al giorni!

Provali e fammi sapere cosa te ne pare.

#dieta #trasformazionefisica #digiunointermittente #umbertomiletto 

Se il video ti è piaciuto lasciami un 👍🏻 Mi Piace e Condividilo con i tuoi amici. Questo mi farà capire che gradisci e mi permetterà di continuare a fare video. Grazie del tuo aiuto!

PS: Seguimi sui miei canali per essere sempre aggiornato sulle mie novità:
👊👊 Attrezzi Calisthenics IronLink https://ironlink.eu/ 
🎥 YouTube Video Gratis https://goo.gl/nANQ9q  
📸 Instagram https://www.instagram.com/umbertomiletto/   
💪🏻 Facebook https://www.facebook.com/milettoumberto/  
👕 Abbigliamento Burningate http://shop.burningate.com/  
➡️ http://www.il-personaltrainer.com  il Blog di allenamento del personal trainer Umberto Miletto

Avvertenze: le informazioni contenute in questi video non intendono sostituirsi in nessun modo a parere medico o di altri specialisti. L'autore declina ogni responsabilità di effetti o di conseguenze risultanti dall'uso di tali informazioni e dalla loro messa in pratica. L'allenamento con sovraccarichi, a corpo libero, con i kettlebell, con il trx, e con altri attrezzi può causare infortuni, si consiglia pertanto di prestare la massima attenzione e di eseguire esercizi e metodologie adatte al proprio livello di forma. Consultare il proprio medico di fiducia prima di intraprendere qualsiasi forma di attività fisica o regime alimentare.

snippet.title: BRIOCHES ANGELICA SOFFICISSIME 🍊CON ARANCIA E GOCCE DI CIOCCOLATO 🍫
snippet.description:
Ciao a tutti oggi mi sono ispirata alla torta Angelica, ed ho pensato di proporti delle piccole brioches Angelica per la prima colazione con arancia candita e gocce di cioccolato. Sono sofficissime, ottime da mangiare con un cappuccino o un caffè. Spero che l'idea ti piaccia, a presto! 😍
🌸IL BLOG: https://lericettediterroresplendore.blogspot.com/2021/04/brioches-angelica-sofficissime-con.html
🌸FACEBOOK: https://www.facebook.com/LeRicetteDiTerroreSplendore/
🌸INSTAGRAM: https://www.instagram.com/lericettediterroresplendore/
🌸GRUPPO FACEBOOK "CUCINO DUNQUE SONO": https://www.facebook.com/groups/163961603801613/
🌸TWITTER: https://twitter.com/carletticarla67

Ingredienti per 8 brioches grandi:
Per il lievitino:
-100g di farina manitoba con 13g di proteine  
-100g di acqua leggermente tiepida oppure a temperatura ambiente 
-9g di lievito di birra fresco (3g se usi quello secco)
-1 cucchiaino di miele o di zucchero 
Per l'impasto:
-il lievitino 
-425g di farina 0 con 10g di proteine 
-80g di latte a temperatura ambiente
-2 uova medie  
-100g di zucchero
-100g di burro a temperatura ambiente 
-1 cucchiaino di estratto di vaniglia
-scorza di arancia non trattata
-2g di sale 
ingredienti per farcire:
-30g di burro fuso per spennellare
-120g di gocce di cioccolato fondente (15g per brioches)
-50g di arancia candita 
-zucchero a velo per spolverizzare 


#lericettediterroresplendore #brioches #briochesangelica #cucina #cooking #eating #colazione #briochessofficissime

sq.title: Të gjithë do ta duan këtë recetë! Brioches të butë dhe të shijshëm!
sq.description:
🌸IL BLOG: https://lericettediterroresplendore.blogspot.com/2021/04/brioches-angelica-sofficissime-con.html
🌸FACEBOOK: https://www.facebook.com/LeRicetteDiTerroreSplendore/

🌸TWITTER: https://twitter.com/carletticarla67

Përbërësit për 8 brioches:
Krijoni një brumë fillestar:
100g miell "Manitoba" (13g proteina)
100g ujë në temperaturë dhome

1 lugë çaji me mjaltë ose sheqer

Brumë:
Brumi i krijuar në fillim
425g miell 0 (10g proteina)

2 vezë të mesme
100g sheqer
100g gjalpë në temperaturë dhome
1 lugë çaji ekstrakt vanilje
Lëvore portokalli
2g kripë

30g gjalpë të shkrirë
120g çokollatë të zezë
50g portokall të sheqerosur
sheqer pluhur

100 g smør ved stuetemperatur

appelsinskal

50 g kandiseret appelsin 
Florsukker

100 g boter op kamertemperatuur

en.title: Everyone will love this recipe! Soft and delicious brioches!
en.description:

🌸TWITTER: https://twitter.com/carletticarla67

Ingredients for 8 brioches:
Create pre-dough:
100g of Manitoba flour (13g of protein)
100g of water at room temperature
9g fresh brewer's yeast (3g if using dry yeast)
1 teaspoon of honey or sugar

Dough:
The dough created at the beginning
425g of 0 type flour (10g of protein)
80g of milk at room temperature
2 medium eggs
100g of sugar
100g of butter at room temperature
1 teaspoon of vanilla extract
Orange peel
2g of salt

30g of melted butter
120g of dark chocolate
50g of candied orange
powdered sugar

100 g kambario temperatūros sviesto
